channel.title: Ethics on Ahmed Azeez
channel.description: Recent content in Ethics on Ahmed Azeez

item.title: Public Health Ethics: Types, Principles and Advantages
item.description: What is Ethics? What is Public Health Ethics? Principles of Ethical Practice in Public Health Types of Ethics for a Public Health Professional Steps in a Process of Ethical Decision Making Importance of Ethics for Public Health Professionals References and For More Information What is Ethics? Ethics are the set of rules that govern our expectations of our own and others' behavior. The term 'ethics' is derived from the Greek word ethos that can mean custom, tradition, personality or disposition.
